LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE NOV-18-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO TERMS OF PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2024 Continued To Jan-08-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-18-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-23-2024 Continued To Nov-20-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
